title: UPI Service Degradation — Incident 1
rootCause: Expired API Certificate affecting UPI

chain.detail: Anomaly detected in UPI transaction latency.
Expired API Certificate occurred in infrastructure.
Related microservices started rejecting connections.
UPI service reported degraded operation status.

recommendation: Perform immediate security patch or review Expired API Certificate to secure the component.
